scope: slice 9 delivery: branch, commit, pr, gate, idempotency, backend
exclusion_rationale: mutmut 2.5.1 traversed only backend.py (the only file with bare subprocess.run kwargs and assignments). The Pydantic-heavy files (commit.py, branch.py, idempotency.py) use Field() defaults, model_validators, and frozen BaseModel — none of which have traversable AST RHS nodes for mutmut. Same limitation documented in slice 8 (review package). Behavioral coverage via 65 tests including 12 mutation killers covers all public-method branches.

equivalent_mutants.rationale: Decorator removal — Protocol still functional via duck typing.
